base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mansion_rooms — a tile from 1995 clock tower. Barrows Mansion rooms — pre-rendered static backgrounds for point-and-click exploration. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
